lohagarh-fort-resort.name: Heritage Room
lohagarh-fort-resort.description: Steeped in Rajasthani artistry, the Heritage Room features hand-painted frescoes, intricately carved wooden furniture, and a private sit-out with lush garden views. A perfect blend of old-world charm and contemporary comfort.

lohagarh-fort-resort.name: Deluxe Room
lohagarh-fort-resort.description: Larger than the Heritage Room, the Deluxe offers expansive views of the Aravalli foothills and a plush lounge corner. Finished in warm sandstone tones with rich textile accents reflecting the finest Rajput craftsmanship.

lohagarh-fort-resort.name: Premier Suite
lohagarh-fort-resort.description: The Premier Suite is a sanctuary of luxury — a separate living room adorned with heirloom artefacts, a master bedroom with a four-poster bed, and an en-suite bathroom with a deep-soak bathtub overlooking a private walled courtyard.

lohagarh-fort-resort.name: Royal Suite
lohagarh-fort-resort.description: Our most sought-after suite reimagines royal Rajput living. With a grand dining area for six, a dressing room, two bathrooms, and a private terrace garden with a plunge pool, the Royal Suite is the epitome of regal grandeur.

lohagarh-fort-resort.name: Presidential Villa
lohagarh-fort-resort.description: An entire villa to yourself — the Presidential is a standalone residence with two bedroom suites, a sprawling private lawn, infinity pool, outdoor lounge, private chef service, and 24-hour dedicated butler. The ultimate expression of Lohagarh luxury.

lohagarh-desert-resort.name: Luxury Swiss Tent
lohagarh-desert-resort.description: Beneath a vast desert sky, our Swiss tents combine the romance of a bygone era with modern luxuries. Each tent features a king bed, plush linen, en-suite bathroom, and a private sit-out perfect for star-gazing.

lohagarh-desert-resort.name: Deluxe Desert Tent
lohagarh-desert-resort.description: Larger and more lavishly appointed, the Deluxe Tent features handwoven Rajasthani textiles, a copper bathtub, and a wraparound deck with sweeping golden-dune panoramas and private bonfire setup.

lohagarh-desert-resort.name: Royal Desert Tent
lohagarh-desert-resort.description: The pinnacle of tented luxury in the Thar Desert — a master tent with a private living pavilion, antique furniture, butler service, and an exclusive sunset deck overlooking the dunes. A retreat fit for desert royalty.

lohagarh-desert-resort.name: Desert Suite
lohagarh-desert-resort.description: A permanent suite structure built in the style of a Jaisalmer haveli, the Desert Suite blends stone craftsmanship with luxurious amenities — featuring a jharokha window, private plunge pool, and a glass-ceiling bedroom for night-sky views.

townhall.name: Standard Room
townhall.description: A comfortable and well-appointed room with warm interiors, ideal for business travellers and couples seeking a restful stay in Bharatpur.

townhall.name: Deluxe Room
townhall.description: Spacious and elegantly styled, the Deluxe Room at Townhall features rich wooden furnishings, soft lighting, and a private balcony overlooking the courtyard garden.

townhall.name: Executive Suite
townhall.description: Our Executive Suite is designed for those who appreciate the finer things — a separate lounge, a work desk, and premium amenities make it perfect for extended stays or celebrating special occasions.

mahalkhas.name: Heritage Room
mahalkhas.description: The Heritage Room at Mahalkhas preserves the spirit of a Rajput haveli — arched doorways, traditional jaali screens, and hand-block printed bed linen create an atmosphere of authentic heritage.

mahalkhas.name: Premium Room
mahalkhas.description: Larger interiors with a contemporary design sensibility layered over heritage architecture. The Premium Room offers a private sit-out and upgraded bathroom with both a shower and soaking tub.

mahalkhas.name: Deluxe Suite
mahalkhas.description: Our Deluxe Suite at Mahalkhas features a generously proportioned living room with antique furniture, a private dining area, and a terrace that frames views of the historic town centre.

kothi-lohagarh.name: Heritage Room
kothi-lohagarh.description: Kothi Lohagarh's Heritage Room is a curated retreat within a restored nobleman's residence. The room blends period furniture and hand-painted walls with modern comfort.

kothi-lohagarh.name: Deluxe Room
kothi-lohagarh.description: More spacious with a private sit-out facing the inner courtyard, the Deluxe Room at Kothi Lohagarh is ideal for those who want to savour the property's intimate heritage character.

kothi-lohagarh.name: Junior Suite
kothi-lohagarh.description: An intimate suite with a separate seating alcove, curated art collection, and a marble bathroom complete with a clawfoot tub. Ideal for honeymooners and anniversary getaways.

kothi-lohagarh.name: Royal Suite
kothi-lohagarh.description: The crown jewel of Kothi Lohagarh — a full-floor suite with a private rooftop terrace, panoramic Jaipur skyline views, a private plunge pool, and dedicated concierge service.

corbett-resort.name: Forest Cabin
corbett-resort.description: Nestled within the dense Corbett forest, each cabin is a private hideaway surrounded by trees and natural sounds. Wake to birdsong and step outside to spot wildlife from your private deck.

corbett-resort.name: Luxury Cottage
corbett-resort.description: A standalone cottage with a wrap-around verandah, separate sitting room, and open-air shower. Designed to immerse you in the sights and sounds of the Corbett wilderness while ensuring every luxury is at hand.

corbett-resort.name: River View Room
corbett-resort.description: Positioned to capture views of the Ramganga River, this room features floor-to-ceiling windows, a spacious bathroom, and a private balcony — the finest vantage point for sunrise over the river.

corbett-resort.name: Premium Suite
corbett-resort.description: Our largest accommodation at Corbett — a two-room suite with a private plunge pool, a sit-out overlooking the forest canopy, and a curated naturalist experience included with every stay.
